creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 212024
svn diff for lang/c

lang/c was recently sent back to the pool. I like
it, and would like to maintain it.
So please find an attached svn diff that simply
makes me the maintainer.

As this port is currently unmaintained. Maintainer
approval is implicit (and so noted).

CHANGES
Makefile

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
